findings.description: Line 14 imports HypothesisResult from investigation_loop (a sibling behavioral/glue module). HypothesisResult is defined in investigation_types.py (a shared data module). This violates the extraction rule 'No back-imports from sibling modules at the same level.' The fix is trivial: change line 14 to 'from marketmind.pipeline.investigation_types import HypothesisResult'.

notes: sanitize_for_llm_prompt called correctly on all string fields (core_logic, narratives, bear_case, source_detail, upside/downside scenarios) before card rendering. All HypothesisResult fields mapped to HypothesisCard. generate_cards() data flow: list[HypothesisResult] -> list[HypothesisCard] complete. The sibling import from investigation_loop is functionally correct (re-export) but architecturally wrong.
